FROM rust:1.82-alpine AS builder

RUN apk add --no-cache musl-dev

WORKDIR /build
COPY Cargo.toml .
COPY src/ src/

RUN cargo build --release

FROM alpine:3.20

RUN apk add --no-cache bash coreutils python3 git && \
    git config --global user.email "bench@needle-bench.cc" && \
    git config --global user.name "needle-bench"

COPY --from=builder /build/target/release/codegen-engine /usr/local/bin/codegen-engine

WORKDIR /app

# compiler-macro-expansion

## Project

A Rust code generation engine (`codegen-engine`) that takes schema definitions and produces struct definitions with typed getter methods. Similar to how a proc macro or protobuf compiler generates accessor code from a schema. The engine handles primitive types, optional fields, lists, and references between structs.

## Symptoms

Simple schemas with flat structs (single-level field access) work correctly. When generating code for schemas with nested struct
